sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21092" key="bruali/kths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βρῠᾰλ-ίκτης</orth> or <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βρυαλλίκτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n21092.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who performs in a kind of war-dance</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0292.tlg001:79" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stesich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">79</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ibyc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">53</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
